# doit_cloud_diagrams (Data Source)

Cloud Diagrams visualize your cloud infrastructure and resource relationships.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up Cloud Diagrams containing a specific BigQuery dataset
data "doit_cloud_diagrams" "example" {
  resources = [
    "//bigquery.googleapis.com/projects/my-project/datasets/my_dataset",
  ]
}

# Access the diagram URLs
output "diagram_urls" {
  value = [for d in data.doit_cloud_diagrams.example.cloud_diagrams : d.diagram_url]
}

output "image_urls" {
  value = [for d in data.doit_cloud_diagrams.example.cloud_diagrams : d.image_url]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resources` (List of String) Resource IDs to find diagrams for.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_diagrams` (Attributes Set) List of diagram URLs matching the criteria. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_diagrams))
- `id` (String) A deterministic hash of the resource IDs, used as the data source identifier.

<a id="nestedatt--cloud_diagrams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cloud_diagrams`

Read-Only:

- `diagram_url` (String) URL to the diagram viewer.
- `image_url` (String) URL to the diagram image.
